name: Bambulab BBL-3DP-001-V4-normal
start_gcode:
G90
M220 S100 ;Reset Feedrate
M221 S100 ;Reset Flowrate
M140 S[first_layer_bed_temperature] ;set bed temp
M190 S[first_layer_bed_temperature] ;wait for bed temp

;===== wipe mouth ===============================
G91
G0 Z4 F1200
G90
G28 X
M975 S1
M106 S255
G1 X65 Y250 F18000
G1 Y264 F6000
M109 S{first_layer_temperature[initial_extruder]-20}
G92 E0
G1 E-1 F1200
G1 X100 F18000
G1 X60 Y263.5
M109 S{first_layer_temperature[initial_extruder]-40}
G92 E0
G1 X100
G1 X60 Y263
M109 S{first_layer_temperature[initial_extruder]-60}
G92 E0
G1 X100
G1 X60 Y262.5
M109 S{first_layer_temperature[initial_extruder]-80}
G1 X100
G1 F30000
G1 X230 Y15
G28
M106 S255 ; turn on fan
M109 S{first_layer_temperature[initial_extruder]-60}
M104 S140 ; set temp down to heatbed acceptable
G0 E-3 F1200
G1 X35 Y245 F12000
G1 Z-1
G1 F300 ; move slowly to make the hotend cooler
G1 X10  ; 5s
G1 Y230 ; 3s
G1 X35 ; 5s
G1 Y243 ; 2.6s
G1 X11 ; 4.8s
G1 Y232 ; 2.2s
G1 X33 ; 4.4s
G1 Z5 F1200
;===== wipe mouth end ================================

;===== turn on filament runout detection=====================
M412 S1

{if !remove_freq_sweep}
;===== freq sweep ====================================
G0 X128 Y128 Z20 F30000
M400 P200
M970 Q1 A7 B30 C80 H15 K0
M974 Q1 S2 P0
M970 Q0 A9 B30 C90 H15 K0
M974 Q0 S2 P0
G1 F30000
G1 X230 Y15
;===== freq sweep end ================================
{endif}

{if !remove_bed_leveling}
;===== bed leveling ==================================
G29 X{first_layer_print_min[0]} Y{first_layer_print_min[1]} I{first_layer_print_size[0]} J{first_layer_print_size[1]}
;===== bed leveling end ================================
{endif}

{if !remove_extrusion_calibration}
;===== prepare print temperature and material ==========
M104 S[first_layer_temperature] ;set extruder temp
G1 Z2.0 F3000 ;Move Z Axis up
M620 S[initial_tool]   ; switch material if AMS exist
G1 X30 Y50 F12000
G1 Y-3
T[initial_tool]
G1 X54 F12000
G1 Y264
M109 S[first_layer_temperature] 
M400
M106 P1 S0
G92 E0
G1 E20 F300 ; next_filament_flush_length
M400
M106 P1 S255
G92 E0
G1 E20 F300
G1 X70 F9000
G1 X76 F15000
G1 X65 F15000
G1 X76 F15000
G1 X65 F15000; shake to put down garbage
G1 X80 F6000
G1 X95 F15000
G1 X84 F15000
G1 X165 F15000; wipe and shake
M400
M106 P1 S0
M621 S[initial_tool]
G1 X28.0 Y5.0 Z0.3 F6000.0;Move to start position
M109 S{first_layer_temperature[initial_extruder]}
M975 S1
;===== prepare print temperature and material end =====
;===== draw extrinsic para cali paint =================
